programme.title: Love Boat 125
programme.desc: Love Boat 125

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: A big-game hunter resentful of Tracy whom he blames for closing off land to his lifes passion forces the doctor to walk through wild territory on foot hoping to prove that he will have to kill an animal to survive

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder Jonathan hits his head and loses his memory As he tries to recover his memory he starts to suspect he may have had a mistress -- and killed her

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Mary Beth ignores a lump in her breast while Chris and Harvey beg her to get the care she needs Meanwhile the mother of a missing child feels shed get more attention if her son were white

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: After Starsky shoots a 16-year-old armed robber a crazed ex-con vows to kill uniformed policemen until Starsky resigns from the force

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When some thermonuclear detonators are stolen Hawke tried to find them with Airwolfs thermal sensors But the man who stole them plans to use Airwolf to transport them And part of his plan is seducing Caitlin

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A witch fights to gain a powerful occult symbol using a helpless Ryan in the process

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car Then its Matt and Froys big repo Having left the company to start their own they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion And finally Lou Lyndah and Lous cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now hes ready to do the hurting

programme.title: TBH 217
programme.desc: TBH 217

programme.title: TBH 132
programme.desc: TBH 132

programme.title: Munsters 221
programme.desc: Munsters 221

programme.title: Munsters Pilot
programme.desc: Munsters Pilot

programme.title: Addams Family 120
programme.desc: Addams Family 120

programme.title: Addams 207
programme.desc: Addams 207

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E31
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E31

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E34
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E34

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a photographer an old friend of the McCains is accused of murder Mark and Lucas find themselves on opposite sides against each other

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A wagon train master forces a young couple to marry after they hide the fact that one is a girl and Lucas takes them in to help them; but trouble soon arises when a drunken crowd calls for a Shivaree

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E26 Anybody Can Kill a Marshal
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E26 Anybody Can Kill a Marshal

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ross Marquettes behavior over the past few months cant be easily explained -- beating his wife rustling cattle robbing a stage killing a man Adam is determined to find out why his friend is acting so strangely before its too late

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: To avoid prosecution and to increase the value of his work an artist fakes his own death following the accidental death of one of his models Before long he goes stir crazy cooped in the loft apartment and accuses his wife of having an affair Later two ladies reluctantly agree to let a guy move into their apartment but theyre apprehensive about his intentions - for good reason

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Peggy wants to make sure her honeymoon turns out perfect

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Jonas has been forced into mandatory retirement He cant relax though because Anitas friends are driving him crazy

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Cocky lawyer Steve and his passive buddy Brett indulge behave irresponsibly on a cross country joyride and film their exploits After Steve runs down a man on the road and tries to hide it consequences catch up at a remote redneck bar

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A smooth talking vitamin salesman contends with a rival and a mysterious woman he follows home

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Natalie are puzzled by the rapid aging of a murder victim

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan investigate the murder of a gym owner and realize that a mysterious pair of boxing gloves may be to blame

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Parker and the Crew scheme to get McHale chosen for a War Bond tour of The States but when they find out that they wont be included they must cook up another plan to get McHale off the hook

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber has been selling Fujis Polynesian dishes to the Taratupa personnel and trouble develops when Binghamton - Having sampled the delicious food - Insists that it be served at a dinner for a visiting Admiral

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans body conducts electricity after he is struck by lightning with a bowling ball in his hand But when The Professor tries to remove the bowling ball from Gilligans hand a second lightning strike makes him invisible

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E16
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E16

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E36
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E36

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Smart is hypnotized to kill the Chief during their nightly game of chess

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and Fang investigate an animal spa where other agents dogs killed them after visiting it

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJs truck is hijacked by three beautiful sisters They need BJs rig and his help in order to make a big moonshine run that will raise money for their ailing fathers operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Hogans 327
programme.desc: Hogans 327

programme.title: Hogans 316
programme.desc: Hogans 316

programme.title: WKRP 106
programme.desc: WKRP 106

programme.title: WKRP 109
programme.desc: WKRP 109

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: After another on-field humiliation Wood quits as football coach and opens a sporting goods store

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Will wants a rare racing set for Christmas and Herman manages to find itfour hours away He and Wood set out on Christmas Eve to get it and find themselves stranded when their car breaks down

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Dans hired by a designer whos at the hotel to unveil her new line It seems some of her models are being terrorized and one of them is Dans ex While investigating the men who are terrorizing them are putting their plan in motion One of the men who fears that Dans ex who saw him commit one of their acts against them might identify him kills her which makes things more personal for Dan

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Maxs long-dead ex-wife suddenly reappears kidnapping and a hot diamond necklace are not far behind

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: A melodramatic marriage crisis of one of the townsfolk keeps interfering with Dicks book deadline

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joanna allow Kirk to hold his new singles group at the inn

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Howells discover that they are not legally married But as The Skipper prepares to marry them in the lagoon a fight causes them to call off the wedding altogether

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: In the second season opener the series develops a more supernaturalweird tone as Mitch and Griff investigate a sunken freighter where they fight for their lives against an unknown force and realize that the freighter might have been sunk by a New Guinea sea monster according to a woman they found floating in the ocean near sunken wreckage of her sailboat

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Police captain William Boone is asked to join the security team of Companion Daan of the Taelon an alien race that came to earth three years ago

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to clone a popular motivational speaker in order to control the minds of the rich and powerful Suzanne and Harrison plan to capture an alien drone

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim encounters Humphrey a dwarf who has escaped from the evil Dr Arcane

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane makes a woman look like Hollands wife He makes sure Holland aka Swamp Thing sees her He approaches her and she runs away He later tests her She then asks him for his notes hoping it could help him But Arcane is after one of his formulas At the same time Holland recalls his last moments with his wife and moment when he became Swamp Thing because of Arcane

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Contact is made with the planet Piri where the main computer created an idyllic life that led to extinction of its population through apathy Now John Koenig must fight to save Alpha as his people fall under the same fate

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: When Cheyenne visits Jim ONeil in Texas he learns he is to hang the next day Jim refuses to give Cheyenne any details nor did he defend himself at his trial Against Jims wishes Cheyenne investigates the situation to save his friend

programme.title: Young 219
programme.desc: Young 219

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A young patient from a psychiatric home tells the police that an elderly patient at the facility was murdered After the young man is found dead himself Steve decides to feign mental illness to gain admittance to the place fearing that someone may be killing patients

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An elderly cardinal has been taken prisoner in a fictional Eastern European country because the clergyman is the leader of the political opposition The IMF force is tasked with freeing him from the inescapable prison

programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.desc: A known extortionist claims he is innocent of recent charges Gannon and Friday interrogate him about different incidents and then bring out a surprise device which proves his guilt

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The updated adventures of a bumbling detective

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians must stop three fire-breathing dinosaurmonster hybrids

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: A captured Cy-Kill is held temporarily on a remote prison planet Elba while a new Brainstorming device is readied; Fitor plots to rescue his cohort by defecting to the Guardians

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce and Herc land the barge on a planet with incredibly huge plants Saw Boss is sending vines to grow there and Jayce must stop them But Jayce Gillian and Herc are captured by warrior crusaders Oon stumbles into the castle where they are being held and accidentally removes the shield from the stone making him the new leader Everyone joins together to rid the planet of monster minds The crusaders learn that not all intruders are enemies; some are friends

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce is led to an abandoned ship by a signal from his father Jayce finds his father has left a message for him but he needs more power from the Pride to receive the coordinates of his fathers destination A self-destruct mechanism is activated and Jayce must work quickly to get the message while battling monster minds They get away with only seconds to spare

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While the N team tries to get Simons memory back Mother Brain gets King Hippo and Eggplant Wizard to brainwash him into thinking hes an N-Team hunter Later Simon believes he is Donkey Kong Jr

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The team encounters a band of children from another planet whose spaceship might bring them all home The only problem is that the ship is in Vengers hands
